data.title: Curtis Wilcox and Paul Niemiec Join Lincoln Investment
data.description: Fort Washington, Pennsylvania - On March 30, 2026, Lincoln Investment Planning, LLC, a prominent company offering financial planning, investment advisory, and retirement solutions, revealed that financial advisors Curtis Wilcox and Paul Niemiec have recently become part of their team. Lincoln Investment continues to expand its workforce with dedicated professionals to enhance their services.

data.title: Shelton Capital Management Becomes the Investment Advisor of STF Management ETFs (TUG, TUGN)
data.description: Today, Shelton Capital Management disclosed that it will take over as the investment advisor for the assets of STF Management LP. This includes managing two exchange-traded funds: the STF Tactical Growth ETF (TUG) and the STF Tactical Growth &... The switch in management is expected to impact the management of assets valued at $X million.

data.title: Animal Protein Ingredients Market to Reach USD 15,566.54 Million by 2032 Amid Rising Demand for Protein-Rich Diets, Functional Foods, and Premium Nutrition Products - Credence Research
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in London, a new report titled "Animal Protein Ingredients Market – Growth, Share, Opportunities & Competitive Analysis, 2025 – 2032" was incorporated into Credence Research Inc.'s portfolio. According to the report, the worldwide Animal Protein Ingredients Market reached a value of USD 6,805.39 million.

data.title: PrideStaff South Orange County-Mission Viejo Moves to New Office
data.description: Announced on March 30, 2026, PrideStaff, a nationally franchised staffing agency, shared its decision to relocate the South Orange County Mission Viejo office to a new address on March 20, 2026. This move aims to bolster operations and further expand their reach. The new office will be under the guidance of their established leadership team.

data.title: BT Brands Reports 2025 Results, Delivers 138% EBITDA Growth and Advances Transformational Aero Velocity Merger
data.description: BT Brands, Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under ticker symbols BTBD and BTBDW, shared its financial report for the 52-week period ending on December 28, 2025. The company emphasized its operational recovery and advancement towards merging with Aero Velocity, Inc. Key highlights from 2025 include a significant 138% rise in restaurant-level EBITDA to $1.7 million compared to $723,828 in 2024. Additionally, the operating loss showed an improvement of around 80% declining to $(364,585) from the previous year.

data.title: Gregoire Outters Promoted to President of Teledyne Marine Group
data.description: A company based in Thousand Oaks, California, Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE: TDY) has appointed Gregoire Outters as the President of its Teledyne Marine Group. Outters will oversee the Maritime businesses within the Digital Imaging segment and now also the Marine businesses within the Instrumentation segment. The transition is immediate. Teledyne Marine Group encompasses a range of top products and technologies, with a significant presence in the industry.

data.title: MBK Rental Living Begins Leasing at Las Brisas in California's Central Coast
data.description: A newly opened luxurious garden-style apartment community in Santa Maria with 340 units is now available for residents. The location is ideal for employees working at top companies in the area. Developed by MBK Rental Living, a leading lifestyle developer of residential communities, this modern living space in Irvine, California offers upscale housing options.

data.title: Bitcoin accumulation addresses acquire 67K BTC; miner-led selling drops. Inflows hit 67,000 BTC, miner outflows at record low since 2024.
data.description: Recent data from blockchain analysis reveals that accumulation addresses have received over 67,000 BTC in inflows. At the same time, outflows from Bitcoin miners have decreased significantly, reaching levels unseen since 2024. This suggests a trend of increased accumulation and reduced selling pressure in the market.

data.title: Marex Group Sees RS Rating Jump to 83
data.description: Marex Group has demonstrated positive price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 75 to 83. This improvement highlights the company's strengthening position in the market.

data.title: Ran Neuner questions Bitcoin's core identity and market risks in a Cointelegraph interview.
data.description: During an interview with Cointelegraph, Ran Neuner reflects on Bitcoin facing an identity crisis, potential market risks, and the increasing influence of macro trends. The discussion delved into the challenges and uncertainties surrounding Bitcoin, with Neuner emphasizing the significance of macroeconomic factors. The interview highlighted the importance of monitoring market fluctuations and being aware of the broader economic landscape that could impact Bitcoin's trajectory. Neuner's insights shed light on the complexities of Bitcoin's current position, underscoring the need for a nuanced understanding of both internal and external drivers shaping its future path.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury company halts purchases after 13 weeks, no explanation from CEO as weekly buy is skipped.
data.description: The largest publicly-known Bitcoin treasury company has skipped its weekly purchase of the cryptocurrency for the first time in 13 weeks, a move that has raised eyebrows in the crypto community. This silence from the company's CEO, Michael Saylor, has created uncertainty among investors. This development marks a significant change from the company's consistent buying pattern, with the missed purchase amounting to a considerable sum in Bitcoin. The decision has led to speculation about the company's strategy and future moves regarding its Bitcoin holdings.
